title: Minecraft Grass Block Guy
description: I made the meme a reality. The guy's YouTube channel is @Kharrii.
body:
# Minecraft Grass Block Guy

I made the meme a reality. The guy's YouTube channel is [@Kharrii](https://youtube.com/@Kharrii).

![A screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/l34BhjNq/images/5baf5aff2e37c6d0cae364c6a21b2d78b685c492.png)

![Another screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/l34BhjNq/images/0a00214061b7b06f3d5d47bfbac29fdca23698cc.png)

Screenshots are using the [Rethinking Voxels](https://modrinth.com/shader/rethinking-voxels) shaderpack.
